_publications._publicationTitle: Influences of RASopathies on Neuroanatomical Variation in Children.

_contextSnippet: Our vertex-wise group comparison analysis of RASopathies versus TD for SA resulted in alterations in several cortical regions ( cluster-based fwe p < 0.05 corrected )
details: Successfully performed vertex-wise group comparison analysis detecting significant cortical surface area alterations (cluster-based fwe p < 0.05 corrected) and cortical thickness differences between RASopathies and TD groups. Detected large effect sizes (d>0.79) in multiple brain regions.
